details.test: Task 1: Register for earliest free in-person evening support meeting within 10 miles
Task 2: Save two recent sleep-problem articles to reading list
Task 3: Plan exercise class and evening event under $30 and add both to planner
Task 4: Add nearest highly rated neurologist accepting new patients to care team
Task 5: Bookmark a suitable support group and verify it is saved
Task 6: Configure SMS reminders 1 day and 1 hour before for exercise and caregiver events
Task 7: Post anonymous question in Medications & Side Effects forum
Task 8: Create Caregiver 30-minute Starter collection with three short resources
Task 9: Build weekly plan with two exercise classes and one support group in My Planner
